producer.origin: elara-mesh maintainer receipts feed — act 019f7820-b984-7ec2-b196-2066acc3794b; assembled from /record/{id}/wire: the signed act record + an epoch seal current at snapshot time (on today's single-zone mesh that is the zone-0 seal; per-act zone resolution lands with multi-zone).
